REBALANCEDSPIRE-BOOMING_CONCH.descriptio: The first [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards you play are free to play in [gold]Elite[/gold] combats.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-FIDDLE.description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Decrease your max hand size by [red]{Cards}[/red].
REBALANCEDSPIRE-LAVA_ROCK.description: Every [blue]4[/blue] combats, enemies drop an additional [gold]Uncommon[/gold] card reward.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-LORDS_PARASOL.descriptio: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. When you encounter the [gold]Merchant[/gold], immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells. The chance for a Shop to appear in [gold]?[/gold] rooms is doubled.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NEOWS_LAMENT.description: Enemies in your first [blue]{Rooms}[/blue] combats will have [blue]1[/blue] HP.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NEOWS_LAMENT.eventDescri: Enemies in your first [blue]{Rooms}[/blue] combats will have [blue]1[/blue] HP.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NEOWS_LAMENT.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NEOWS_LAMENT.title: Neow's Lament
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NUTRITIOUS_OYSTER.descri: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-NUTRITIOUS_OYSTER.eventD: Raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
REBALANCEDSPIRE-SERE_TALON.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]{CurseCards}[/blue] [red]{Writhe}[/red] and [blue]{WishCards}[/blue] [purple]{Wish}[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
REBALANCEDSPIRE-TOASTY_MITTENS.descripti: At the start of your turn, select a playable card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Exhaust[/gold], and gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
